string.name: lichobileNewAppAvailable
string.comment: Part of a message sent to users of the old mobile app (https://github.com/lichess-org/lichobile).

resources.string: En ny mobilapp for Lichess er tilgjengelig!

string.name: lichobileNewAppDownload
string.comment:
%s links to https://lichess.org/app
Part of a message sent to users of the old mobile app (https://github.com/lichess-org/lichobile).

resources.string: Last ned den nye offisielle Lichess-appen fra %s.
